cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: The native build is lacking features such as fullscreen support, and some DLC. It also had distorted sound when I tried to play recently. To get the windows build running with Proton I installed dotnet40 and xna40 via winetricks, after that the game runs flawlessly.
title: Sword of the Stars: The Pit

notes: Since 4.11-2 the windows version in proton launches without any additional tweaks on my system. So i prefer this one over the native because of the lack of features.
title: Sword of the Stars: The Pit
